title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: A YouTube walkthrough of Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model demonstrating eight practical workflows including multimodal vision, video understanding with Python charting, contract analysis, code generation from sketches, voice-to-task conversion, error fixing, OCR-based receipt parsing, and workspace automation.
